name: Pew Pew Puzzle Defense
short_description: A fast-paced mashup of tower defense, color-matching puzzles, and retro arcade chaos! Build, shoot, and strategize solo or in couch co-op to survive waves of colorful blocks.
detailed_description:
Pew Pew Puzzle Defense is a colorful collision of tower defense, match-3 puzzles, and retro arcade action. Inspired by classics like Puzzle Bobble and modern TD hybrids, this game challenges you to build smart, shoot fast, and react even faster.

Key Features


🏰 5 unique tower types: auto-cannons, color-changers, and more

🔥 Unlockable Hard Mode with extra colors and tougher blocks

🕹️ Multiple field sizes for solo or local co-op/versus modes

🏆 Leaderboards, milestones, and achievements to chase

🦖 Dinosaurs, explosions, pixel art, and pure couch chaos
